final:
module top_module(
    input [4:0] ID_rs,
    input [4:0] ID_rt,
    input [4:0] EX_rt,
    input EX_ramtoreg,
    output load_use_hazard
);assign load_use_hazard = EX_rt != 0 && EX_ramtoreg && (EX_rt == ID_rs || EX_rt == ID_rt);
    
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (EX_rt == 0) begin
        load_use_hazard <= 1'b0;
      end else if (EX_ramtoreg == 0) begin
        load_use_hazard <= 1'b0;
      end else if (EX_rt != ID_rs && EX_rt != ID_rt) begin
        load_use_hazard <= 1'b0;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
